description:
You are a localization engineer who has just received a small update-log generated by an internal translation-sync script.  
Your goal is to produce a very short, machine-verifiable summary of the log so that a CI job can quickly fail if serious issues appear.

Starting situation  
• The log file already exists at  
  /home/user/projects/app/locale/translation_update.log  

• Its exact contents are the five lines below (including the surrounding square brackets and single leading spaces on each line after the first):  
[INFO] 2023-11-10 10:00:00 Added translation key: welcome_message  
 [WARNING] 2023-11-10 10:01:00 Missing translation for key: goodbye_message  
 [INFO] 2023-11-10 10:02:00 Updated translation key: help_message  
 [ERROR] 2023-11-10 10:03:00 Duplicate translation key: welcome_message  
 [INFO] 2023-11-10 10:04:00 Added translation key: new_feature_message  

What you must deliver  
1. Create a new directory  
   /home/user/projects/app/reports  
   if it does not already exist.  
2. Inside that directory create a file called  
   translation_log_summary.txt  
3. The summary file must contain **exactly four lines**, each terminated with a Unix newline (LF).  
   The required format is strictly:

   Total lines: <NUMBER>  
   INFO: <NUMBER>  
   WARNING: <NUMBER>  
   ERROR: <NUMBER>

   where <NUMBER> is the count of log entries of each kind found in /home/user/projects/app/locale/translation_update.log.  
4. The numbers must be computed from the actual log file, not hard-coded.  
5. Do not modify the original log file.  
6. Use only standard GNU/Linux utilities available in a minimal distribution (e.g. grep, wc, awk, cut, sed, mkdir, etc.).  

When you are done, the automated checker will look for /home/user/projects/app/reports/translation_log_summary.txt and will verify that:

• The file exists and is readable by the current user.  
• Its four lines (and nothing else) match exactly:  
  Total lines: 5  
  INFO: 3  
  WARNING: 1  
  ERROR: 1  

Only that precise content (with the single leading space in line 2-4 **not** present) and line order will be considered correct.
truth:
Pre-existing file and its contents before the agent starts:

Path: /home/user/projects/app/locale/translation_update.log  
Contents (including spaces and newlines):
[INFO] 2023-11-10 10:00:00 Added translation key: welcome_message
[WARNING] 2023-11-10 10:01:00 Missing translation for key: goodbye_message
[INFO] 2023-11-10 10:02:00 Updated translation key: help_message
[ERROR] 2023-11-10 10:03:00 Duplicate translation key: welcome_message
[INFO] 2023-11-10 10:04:00 Added translation key: new_feature_message
<LF at end of file>

Expected artefact created by the agent:

Path: /home/user/projects/app/reports/translation_log_summary.txt  
Required contents (each line ending with LF):

Total lines: 5
INFO: 3
WARNING: 1
ERROR: 1
name: task_000000_a356e455
